title: wolfhsm: no RustCrypto trait impls (Signer, Verifier, AeadInPlace)
description: EccP256Key, Ed25519Key, AesKey, etc. do not implement any RustCrypto traits (signature::Signer/Verifier, aead::AeadInPlace, digest::Digest, etc.). This makes them incompatible with any code that accepts generic impl Signer<_> or similar. The crate is a dead-end for ecosystem interoperability.
notes: NEEDS HUMAN DECISION: whether to implement RustCrypto trait impls (Signer/Verifier/AeadInPlace) at 0.1.0. Significant API surface change.
